title: Rat Extermination in Somers, NY | $350-$600

faqs.question: How much does rat extermination cost in Somers, NY?
faqs.answer: Rat extermination in Somers typically costs between $350 and $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and number of entry points. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before starting any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a rat problem in Somers?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for rat infestations in Somers and throughout Westchester County. Our team understands the urgency of rat problems and prioritizes rapid response to prevent further damage and health risks to your family or customers.

faqs.question: What methods do you use for rat extermination in Somers?
faqs.answer: We use a comprehensive approach including thorough inspection, strategic trap placement, rodenticide application when necessary, entry point sealing, and sanitation recommendations. Our methods are safe for homes with children and pets while being highly effective against Norway rats and roof rats common in Somers.

faqs.question: Do you offer guarantees for rat extermination services in Somers?
faqs.answer: Yes, we stand behind our work with a service guarantee. If rats return within the warranty period after treatment, we'll come back at no additional charge. We also offer ongoing prevention programs to keep your Somers property rat-free year-round.
